use_cases: FAQ sections on websites where users can expand/collapse questions
Documentation pages to organize content into collapsible sections
Settings panels to group related options that can be expanded
Product feature listings with expandable details
Educational content organization with hierarchical information
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist accordion component that allows users to expand and collapse content sections. Supports single or multiple item expansion with smooth motion animations and a rotating chevron indicator. Built with motion/react for fluid transitions and fully accessible with aria-expanded attributes.
